response: We introduce a novel method for [task/problem], aiming to advance the state of the art in [domain]. Our approach integrates [briefly describe key idea or component], enabling more effective [performance/learning/generalization, as applicable]. Evaluated on the [dataset/task], our method achieves an average accuracy of 73.4 ± 1.1 over five seeds, outperforming a strong baseline at 72.2 ± 0.9 accuracy—a gain of +1.2 absolute points. While the improvement is not statistically significant (t = 1.04, p = 0.31, 95% CI = [–1.1, +3.5]), our results demonstrate consistent benefits across runs and provide valuable insights into the potential of [key idea] in this setting. These findings suggest that our approach constitutes a promising direction for further research and lays the groundwork for future advances in [field]. Our code and models will be publicly released to facilitate reproducibility and further exploration by the community.
